hindi: अङ्गं हरेः पुलकभूषणमाश्रयन्ती, भृङ्गाङ्गनेव मुकुलाभरणं तमालम्।
english: She who clings to the form of Vishnu adorned with horripilation, like a bee-woman to the Tamala tree with bud ornaments
roman: Angam hareh pulaka bhushanam ashrayanti, bhringanga neva muku labharanam tamalam

english: She who has accepted all glories, whose sidelong glance is sport — may the auspicious goddess of good fortune bless me
roman: Angikeeta akhila vibhutir apanga leela, mangalya dastu mama mangala devataayah

hindi: मुग्धा मुहुर्विदधती वदने मुरारेः, प्रेमत्रपाप्रणिहितानि गतागतानि।
english: The charming one, again and again casting shy glances filled with love at the face of Murari
roman: Mugdha muhurvidadhati vadane Muraareh, prema trapa pranihitani gataagatani

hindi: माला दृशोर्मधुकरीव महोत्पले या, सा मे श्रियं दिशतु सागरसम्भवायाः॥
english: Her eyes move like bees on great lotuses — may that Lakshmi born of the ocean bestow prosperity on me
roman: Mala drishor madhukari va mahoutpale ya, sa me shriyam dishatu sagara sambhavayah

english: Approaching Mukunda with half-closed eyes, the source of bliss, unwinking, beyond Cupid
roman: Amilita aksha madhigamya muda Mukundam, ananda kandam animesham ananga tantram

english: The consort of the one lying on the serpent, with her eyes slightly turned — may she be my prosperity
roman: Akekara sthita kaneenika pakshmane tram, bhutyai bhavanmama bhujanga shayanga nayah

hindi: देहि सौभाग्यमारोग्यं देहि मे परमं सुखम्।
english: Grant me good fortune, grant me health, grant me supreme happiness
roman: Dehi saubhagyam arogyam dehi me paramam sukham

hindi: रूपं देहि जयं देहि यशो देहि द्विषो जहि॥
english: Grant me beauty, grant me victory, grant me fame, destroy my enemies
roman: Rupam dehi jayam dehi yasho dehi dvisho jahi
